_comment: City of San Diego franchised hauler list by ZIP. Source: franchisedhaulerlist.sandiego.gov. Updated: 2026-04-24.

haulers.name: EDCO Disposal Corporation
haulers.notes: Primary franchised hauler for central/eastern San Diego ZIPs including 92105 (active project). Miramar transfer station.

haulers.name: Republic Services of San Diego
haulers.notes: Serves southern and military-adjacent ZIP codes.

haulers.name: Waste Management of San Diego
haulers.notes: Serves north San Diego / Mira Mesa / Scripps Ranch corridor.

haulers.name: Miramar Greenery (City-operated recycling)
haulers.notes: City-operated green waste and C&D recycling drop-off. Open to all City of San Diego ZIPs. Used for WMF recycling facility documentation.

haulers.name: Miramar Landfill (City-operated disposal)
haulers.notes: City-operated landfill for residual C&D waste. Used for WMF disposal facility documentation.

active_project.recycling_facility: Miramar Greenery — 8108 Miramar Rd, San Diego, CA 92126
active_project.disposal_facility: Miramar Landfill — 5180 Convoy St, San Diego, CA 92111

lookup_note: For current franchised hauler by address, verify at: https://www.sandiego.gov/environmental-services/recycling/cdrecycle
